untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic thresholds for: (1) pullback depth as percentage of prior leg high (requires swing high identification not in allowed indicators), (2) risk-to-reward ratio calculation (requires position sizing logic beyond indicator comparison), (3) support structure detection (requires pattern recognition not in allowed indicators), (4) mean reversion signal specification (not defined), and (5) prior swing high/resistance level identification (requires swing detection). These require multi-bar logic and position-aware calculations beyond the 3-field condition structure.
translation_notes: Attempted proxies: ema_50 uptrend for higher timeframe confirmation, close > sma_20 for lower timeframe setup, rsi_14 < 40 for pullback/oversold condition, prev_low breach for stop loss. However, the core logic of measuring pullback depth relative to prior swing highs and enforcing asymmetric risk/reward ratios cannot be expressed with the available indicators and operators.
